last_concepts: Hot take / contrast: the learning treadmill trap — 7 years of doing everything right and still losing. The execution was always the leak, not the knowledge.
Educational: the 3 cause-of-death moments for beginner accounts — boredom trade, revenge trade, size mistake — mapped clinically, with algos named as immune by design not magic.

Avatar persuasion / fear: JT voices the principiante's 2 a.m. internal monologue on the night they blew their first account, landing on a quiet observation about what changes when you remove the emotional human from the execution.
